recommendations.title: Follow Me

recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: Deep Fear
recommendations.overview: A solo trip aboard a yacht takes a terrifying turn when a woman encounters three drug traffickers clinging to the shattered remains of a boat. They soon force her to dive into shark-infested waters to retrieve kilos of cocaine from the sunken wreck.

recommendations.title: Seriously Single
recommendations.overview: While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.

recommendations.title: Bound to Vengeance
recommendations.overview: A young woman, Eve, fights back and manages to escape a malicious abductor. However, after discovering she may not be the only victim, Eve unravels a darker truth and decides to turn the tables on her captor.

recommendations.title: Not Okay

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.
